title_en: The Cult-Classic Vampire Action Epic Undying Love Returns to Finally Deliver Its Heart-Pounding Conclusion
body_en:
Undying Love is easily one of the more memorable vampire comics to come along in the past couple of decades, with the series garnering praise from everyone from The Walking Dead's Robert Kirkman to Hellboy's Mike Mignola. Unfortunately, the series never received the conclusion it deserved. That's finally changing, though, as creators Tomm Coker and Daniel Freedman work to wrap up this vampire revenge thriller at long last.
Coker and Freedman have turned to Kickstarter to release , collecting the original four issues of the series on its 15th anniversary. The campaign will also be used to fund the completion of the remaining four issues.
IGN can exclusively debut a new preview of the Undying Love hardcover. Check it out in the slideshow gallery below:
Here's the official summary for Undying Love:
Optional extras in the Kickstarter campaign include a slipcase hardcover, a sketchbook, and sketch art from Coker. You can check out now.
For more, see our exclusive interview with Punisher vs. Spider-Man writer Dan Abnett and learn more about Batman's mysterious new butler .
Jesse is a mild-mannered staff writer for IGN. Allow him to lend a machete to your intellectual thicket by following @jschedeen on BlueSky .
